jobs.title: Manager / Senior Manager Transaction Services
jobs.description:
In Transaction Services you will be at the forefront of our client's M&A activity and lead projects and multidisciplinary, first in class teams.
We are looking for a motivated team player who can help us deliver outstanding client projects and advance our team. A career within the Deals Transaction Services team will provide you with the opportunity to help clients achieve maximum value with their M&A activities. We focus on evaluating M&A projects in due diligence, pre and post completion. We conduct pre deal and confirmatory due diligence, execute large-scale enterprise wide integrations, and support complex divestitures and separations on a wide range of areas.

Help our clients with dedicated support for transactions in a wide variety of industries and circumstances (acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures & structured investments).
Work across the areas of buy-side due diligence, sell-side assistance and vendor due diligence, deal and negotiation support for both corporate and private equity clients.
Collaborate with other experts to develop a rapid understanding of the client's business and issues, and articulate your findings appropriately in order to deliver high quality reports.
Work in a diversified, international environment covering multiple areas and industries.
Team up with a network of highly talented and knowledgeable experts.

Bachelor's or master's degree and have a background in finance (CPA or CFA).
Thorough understanding of financial accounting and reporting requirements in accordance with internationally recognized reporting standards (e.g. IFRS, US GAAP).
At least 5 years of experience in providing financial due diligence and other transaction-related services to large companies and private equity fund clients.
Fluent in English, any other language is a plus.
You are energetic, proactive, able to empathise with clients and staff, and are enthusiastic about delivering value to clients.
Flexible and demonstrate willingness to conduct business travel for client assignments or business-related matters.
Excellent analytical skills and are experienced in using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint and additional analytical software tools (e.g. PowerBI, Alteryx) to analyse and present data in a meaningful and efficient way.

titleByLocale.it: Manager / Senior Manager Transaction Services
titleByLocale.en: Manager / Senior Manager Transaction Services

descriptionByLocale.it:
**Transaction Services**

Sarai in prima linea nell'attività M&A dei nostri clienti e guiderai progetti e team multidisciplinari d'eccellenza.

Stiamo cercando un team player motivato che possa aiutarci a realizzare progetti cliente eccezionali e a far progredire il nostro team. Una carriera all'interno del team Deals Transaction Services ti offrirà l'opportunità di aiutare i clienti a massimizzare il valore delle loro attività M&A. Ci concentriamo sulla valutazione di progetti M&A in due diligence, pre e post-completamento. Conduciamo due diligence pre-deal e confermativa, eseguiamo integrazioni aziendali su larga scala e supportiamo complesse cessioni e separazioni in un'ampia gamma di aree.

**Responsabilità principali:**

- Supportare i clienti con assistenza dedicata per transazioni in un'ampia varietà di settori e situazioni (acquisizioni, cessioni, joint venture e investimenti strutturati).
- Operare nelle aree della due diligence buy-side, dell'assistenza sell-side e della vendor due diligence, del supporto alle trattative e alle negoziazioni per clienti corporate e di private equity.
- Collaborare con altri esperti per sviluppare una rapida comprensione del business e delle problematiche del cliente, e articolare adeguatamente i risultati per consegnare report di alta qualità.
- Lavorare in un ambiente diversificato e internazionale che abbraccia più aree e settori.
- Collaborare con una rete di esperti altamente qualificati e competenti.

**Requisiti:**

- Laurea triennale o magistrale con una formazione in finanza (CPA o CFA).
- Approfondita conoscenza dei principi contabili e dei requisiti di reporting in conformità con gli standard di rendicontazione internazionalmente riconosciuti (es. IFRS, US GAAP).
- Almeno 5 anni di esperienza nella fornitura di servizi di financial due diligence e altri servizi legati alle transazioni per grandi aziende e clienti di fondi di private equity.
- Inglese fluente; la conoscenza di qualsiasi altra lingua è un plus.
- Sei energico, proattivo, capace di empatizzare con clienti e collaboratori e sei entusiasta di creare valore per i clienti.
- Flessibile e disponibile a effettuare trasferte di lavoro per incarichi cliente o per questioni aziendali.
- Eccellenti capacità analitiche ed esperienza nell'uso di Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint e ulteriori strumenti software analitici (es. PowerBI, Alteryx) per analizzare e presentare i dati in modo significativo ed efficiente.
descriptionByLocale.en:
In Transaction Services you will be at the forefront of our client's M&A activity and lead projects and multidisciplinary, first in class teams.
We are looking for a motivated team player who can help us deliver outstanding client projects and advance our team. A career within the Deals Transaction Services team will provide you with the opportunity to help clients achieve maximum value with their M&A activities. We focus on evaluating M&A projects in due diligence, pre and post completion. We conduct pre deal and confirmatory due diligence, execute large-scale enterprise wide integrations, and support complex divestitures and separations on a wide range of areas.

Help our clients with dedicated support for transactions in a wide variety of industries and circumstances (acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures & structured investments).
Work across the areas of buy-side due diligence, sell-side assistance and vendor due diligence, deal and negotiation support for both corporate and private equity clients.
Collaborate with other experts to develop a rapid understanding of the client's business and issues, and articulate your findings appropriately in order to deliver high quality reports.
Work in a diversified, international environment covering multiple areas and industries.
Team up with a network of highly talented and knowledgeable experts.

Bachelor's or master's degree and have a background in finance (CPA or CFA).
Thorough understanding of financial accounting and reporting requirements in accordance with internationally recognized reporting standards (e.g. IFRS, US GAAP).
At least 5 years of experience in providing financial due diligence and other transaction-related services to large companies and private equity fund clients.
Fluent in English, any other language is a plus.
You are energetic, proactive, able to empathise with clients and staff, and are enthusiastic about delivering value to clients.
Flexible and demonstrate willingness to conduct business travel for client assignments or business-related matters.
Excellent analytical skills and are experienced in using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint and additional analytical software tools (e.g. PowerBI, Alteryx) to analyse and present data in a meaningful and efficient way.
descriptionByLocale.de:
**Transaction Services**

Du stehst an vorderster Front der M&A-Aktivitäten unserer Kunden und leitest Projekte sowie multidisziplinäre Erstklasse-Teams.

Wir suchen einen motivierten Teamplayer, der uns dabei helfen kann, herausragende Kundenprojekte zu liefern und unser Team voranzubringen. Eine Karriere im Deals Transaction Services Team bietet dir die Möglichkeit, Kunden dabei zu helfen, mit ihren M&A-Aktivitäten maximalen Wert zu erzielen. Wir konzentrieren uns auf die Bewertung von M&A-Projekten in der Due Diligence, vor und nach dem Abschluss. Wir führen Pre-Deal- und Bestätigungs-Due-Diligence durch, führen grossangelegte unternehmensweite Integrationen durch und unterstützen komplexe Veräusserungen und Trennungen in einem breiten Spektrum von Bereichen.

**Hauptaufgaben:**

- Unterstützung unserer Kunden mit gezielter Begleitung bei Transaktionen in einer Vielzahl von Branchen und Situationen (Akquisitionen, Veräusserungen, Joint Ventures und strukturierte Investitionen).
- Arbeit in den Bereichen Buy-side Due Diligence, Sell-side-Unterstützung und Vendor Due Diligence sowie Deal- und Verhandlungsunterstützung für sowohl Corporate- als auch Private-Equity-Kunden.
- Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Experten, um ein rasches Verständnis des Geschäfts und der Probleme des Kunden zu entwickeln und die Ergebnisse angemessen zu artikulieren, um hochwertige Berichte zu liefern.
- Arbeit in einem diversifizierten, internationalen Umfeld, das mehrere Bereiche und Branchen abdeckt.
- Zusammenarbeit mit einem Netzwerk hochtalentierter und kenntnisreicher Experten.

**Anforderungen:**

- Bachelor- oder Masterabschluss mit Hintergrund in Finance (CPA oder CFA).
- Fundiertes Verständnis der Finanzbuchhaltung und Berichterstattungsanforderungen gemäss international anerkannten Rechnungslegungsstandards (z. B. IFRS, US GAAP).
- Mindestens 5 Jahre Erfahrung in der Erbringung von Financial Due Diligence und anderen transaktionsbezogenen Dienstleistungen für Grosskunden und Private-Equity-Fonds-Kunden.
- Fliessende Englischkenntnisse; jede weitere Sprache ist ein Plus.
- Du bist energiegeladen, proaktiv, kannst dich in Kunden und Mitarbeiter einfühlen und bist begeistert davon, Kunden Mehrwert zu liefern.
- Flexibel und bereit, für Kundenaufträge oder geschäftliche Angelegenheiten Geschäftsreisen durchzuführen.
- Ausgezeichnete analytische Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung im Umgang mit Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint und weiteren analytischen Softwaretools (z. B. PowerBI, Alteryx) zur sinnvollen und effizienten Analyse und Präsentation von Daten.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
**Transaction Services**

Vous serez en première ligne des activités M&A de nos clients et dirigerez des projets ainsi que des équipes multidisciplinaires de premier ordre.

Nous recherchons un joueur d'équipe motivé capable de nous aider à réaliser des projets clients exceptionnels et à faire progresser notre équipe. Une carrière au sein de l'équipe Deals Transaction Services vous offrira l'opportunité d'aider les clients à tirer le maximum de valeur de leurs activités M&A. Nous nous concentrons sur l'évaluation de projets M&A en due diligence, avant et après finalisation. Nous effectuons des due diligences pré-deal et confirmatoires, exécutons des intégrations à grande échelle à l'échelle de l'entreprise et soutenons des cessions et séparations complexes dans un large éventail de domaines.

**Responsabilités clés :**

- Aider nos clients grâce à un soutien dédié pour les transactions dans une grande variété de secteurs et de situations (acquisitions, cessions, coentreprises et investissements structurés).
- Intervenir dans les domaines de la due diligence côté acheteur, de l'assistance côté vendeur et de la vendor due diligence, du soutien aux transactions et aux négociations pour les clients tant corporate que de private equity.
- Collaborer avec d'autres experts pour développer une compréhension rapide des activités et des problématiques du client, et formuler vos conclusions de manière appropriée afin de produire des rapports de haute qualité.
- Travailler dans un environnement diversifié et international couvrant de multiples domaines et secteurs.
- Travailler avec un réseau d'experts hautement talentueux et compétents.

**Exigences :**

- Licence ou master avec une formation en finance (CPA ou CFA).
- Compréhension approfondie des exigences en matière de comptabilité financière et de reporting conformément aux normes de reporting internationalement reconnues (p. ex. IFRS, US GAAP).
- Au moins 5 ans d'expérience dans la fourniture de services de due diligence financière et d'autres services liés aux transactions pour de grandes entreprises et des clients de fonds de private equity.
- Anglais courant ; toute autre langue est un atout.
- Vous êtes dynamique, proactif, capable de vous mettre à la place des clients et du personnel, et enthousiaste à l'idée de créer de la valeur pour les clients.
- Flexible et disposé à effectuer des déplacements professionnels pour des missions clients ou des raisons commerciales.
- Excellentes compétences analytiques et expérience dans l'utilisation de Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint et d'autres outils logiciels analytiques (p. ex. PowerBI, Alteryx) pour analyser et présenter des données de manière pertinente et efficace.

jobs.title: Senior Associate / Manager Financial Services Consulting - Liquidity & Funding
jobs.description:
Join PwC Advisory to become part of our Strategy & Transformation Banking Team in Zurich.
Be part of our L&F Team and help our banking clients to transform their liquidity and funding practices to improve their opportunity cost efficiency and to fulfil internal and external requirements, while closely collaborating with Finance, Banking Restructuring and Risk Teams.
BE responsible to further develop the go-to-market strategy for liquidity and funding and manage projects with our key banking clients.
Developi solutions that will help our clients to efficiently measure, manage and use their liquid assets on a short-term operational and mid-term structural basis and integrate that view into their risk understanding in a rising interest rate environment.
Continuously further develop the service offering for the liquidity and funding practice and provide thought leadership to the banking sector.
Be part of a team that operates strongly in an interdisciplinary environment within PwC. You will be using and building bridges to our fellow teams that work at the technological edge in big data analysis and artificial intelligence.
Work in a global environment with the largest banks, you will be embedded in a network of our company that gathers and shares industry insights in Liquidity & Funding worldwide.

An excellent University / ETH Master's degree in Banking, Finance, Economics, Business Administration or an adjacent field that enables you to work with banks and other financial service companies.
A strong affinity for numbers and logical processes, are excellent with Excel and other quantitative programs and feel highly comfortable showing your ideas in Power Point.
Take responsibility for constantly increasing your knowledge in Banking on a personal, intrinsic basis throughout your career.
More than 3 years (SA) / 5 years (M) of hands-on experience in the Banking Sector or Consulting and have gathered extensive experience working on liquidity and funding topics incl. Funds Transfer Pricing (FTP) and working with Trading, Treasury Departments, Financial Risk or Finance and Accounting Departments.
Extensive experience with complex banking products.
Fluent in English. German is a highly significant plus and other languages (e.g. French) are welcome.
Willing to travel to our client's international locations if required but are not disappointed if you are not needed to leave Zurich at all for a given time.
Programming skills are highly recommended and beneficial (e.g. python).
CFA, FRM certificates are a significant plus.

titleByLocale.it: Senior Associate / Manager Financial Services Consulting - Liquidity & Funding
titleByLocale.en: Senior Associate / Manager Financial Services Consulting - Liquidity & Funding
titleByLocale.de: Senior Associate / Manager Financial Services Consulting - Liquidity & Funding
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Associate / Manager Financial Services Consulting - Liquidity & Funding

descriptionByLocale.it: Entra in PwC Advisory per far parte del nostro team Strategy & Transformation Banking a Zurigo. Fai parte del nostro team L&F e aiuta i nostri clienti bancari a trasformare le loro pratiche di liquidità e funding per migliorare l'efficienza dei costi opportunità e soddisfare i requisiti interni ed esterni, collaborando strettamente con i team Finance, Banking Restructuring e Risk. Sii responsabile dell'ulteriore sviluppo della go-to-market strategy per la liquidità e il funding e della gestione di progetti con i nostri principali clienti bancari. Sviluppa soluzioni che aiutino i clienti a misurare, gestire e utilizzare efficacemente le loro attività liquide su base operativa a breve termine e strutturale a medio termine, integrando questa visione nella loro comprensione del rischio in un contesto di tassi d'interesse in aumento. Developpa continuamente l'offerta di servizi per la practice liquidità e funding e fornisci thought leadership al settore bancario. Fai parte di un team che opera in un ambiente fortemente interdisciplinare all'interno di PwC. Utilizzerai e costruirai ponti con i team colleghi che lavorano all'avanguardia tecnologica nell'analisi dei big data e nell'intelligenza artificiale. Lavora in un contesto globale con le maggiori banche; sarai inserito in una rete della nostra azienda che raccoglie e condivide le conoscenze di settore in materia di Liquidity & Funding in tutto il mondo. Requisiti: Eccellente laurea magistrale universitaria / ETH in Banking, Finance, Economics, Business Administration o in un campo affine che ti permetta di lavorare con banche e altre società di servizi finanziari. Forte affinità con i numeri e i processi logici, eccellenti capacità in Excel e altri programmi quantitativi, e grande facilità nel presentare le tue idee in Power Point. Assumi la responsabilità di accrescere continuamente le tue conoscenze nel settore bancario su base personale e intrinseca nel corso della tua carriera. Oltre 3 anni (SA) / 5 anni (M) di esperienza pratica nel settore bancario o nella consulenza, con un'ampia esperienza nei temi di liquidità e funding, inclusi Funds Transfer Pricing (FTP), e nel lavoro con reparti Trading, Treasury, Financial Risk o Finance e Accounting. Ampia esperienza con prodotti bancari complessi. Inglese fluente. Il tedesco è un plus molto significativo; altre lingue (es. francese) sono benvenute. Disponibilità a viaggiare presso le sedi internazionali dei clienti, se necessario, ma senza delusioni qualora non fosse necessario lasciare Zurigo per un determinato periodo. Le competenze di programmazione sono altamente raccomandate e vantaggiose (es. Python). I certificati CFA e FRM costituiscono un plus significativo.

descriptionByLocale.de: Werde Teil von PwC Advisory und unserem Strategy & Transformation Banking Team in Zürich. Werde Teil unseres L&F Teams und hilf unseren Bankenkunden dabei, ihre Liquiditäts- und Funding-Praktiken zu transformieren, um ihre Opportunitätskosteneffizienz zu verbessern und interne sowie externe Anforderungen zu erfüllen – in enger Zusammenarbeit mit den Finance-, Banking Restructuring- und Risk-Teams. Sei verantwortlich für die Weiterentwicklung der Go-to-Market-Strategie für Liquidität und Funding sowie für das Management von Projekten mit unseren wichtigsten Bankenkunden. Entwickle Lösungen, die unseren Kunden helfen, ihre liquiden Mittel auf kurzfristig operativer und mittelfristig struktureller Basis effizient zu messen, zu managen und einzusetzen, und integriere diese Perspektive in ihr Risikoverständnis in einem Umfeld steigender Zinsen. Entwickle kontinuierlich das Serviceangebot für die Liquiditäts- und Funding-Praxis weiter und liefere dem Bankensektor Thought Leadership. Werde Teil eines Teams, das stark in einem interdisziplinären Umfeld innerhalb von PwC agiert. Du wirst Brücken zu unseren Kollegenteams nutzen und aufbauen, die an der technologischen Spitze in Big-Data-Analyse und künstlicher Intelligenz arbeiten. Arbeite in einem globalen Umfeld mit den grössten Banken; du wirst in ein Netzwerk unseres Unternehmens eingebettet, das Branchenerkenntnisse zu Liquidity & Funding weltweit sammelt und teilt. Anforderungen: Exzellenter Universitäts-/ETH-Masterabschluss in Banking, Finance, Economics, Business Administration oder einem verwandten Bereich, der dir die Arbeit mit Banken und anderen Finanzdienstleistungsunternehmen ermöglicht. Starke Affinität zu Zahlen und logischen Prozessen, ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse in Excel und anderen quantitativen Programmen sowie grosses Wohlbefinden beim Präsentieren deiner Ideen in Power Point. Übernimm die Verantwortung, dein Wissen im Banking im Laufe deiner Karriere auf persönlicher, intrinsischer Basis kontinuierlich zu erweitern. Mehr als 3 Jahre (SA) / 5 Jahre (M) praktische Erfahrung im Bankensektor oder in der Beratung mit umfangreicher Erfahrung in Liquiditäts- und Funding-Themen inkl. Funds Transfer Pricing (FTP) sowie in der Zusammenarbeit mit Trading-, Treasury-, Financial-Risk- oder Finance- und Accounting-Abteilungen. Umfangreiche Erfahrung mit komplexen Bankprodukten. Fliessende Englischkenntnisse. Deutsch ist ein sehr bedeutender Vorteil; andere Sprachen (z. B. Französisch) sind willkommen. Bereitschaft, bei Bedarf zu den internationalen Standorten der Kunden zu reisen, aber nicht enttäuscht zu sein, wenn du für eine bestimmte Zeit Zürich nicht verlassen musst. Programmierkenntnisse sind sehr empfehlenswert und vorteilhaft (z. B. Python). CFA- und FRM-Zertifikate sind ein erheblicher Vorteil.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rejoignez PwC Advisory pour faire partie de notre équipe Strategy & Transformation Banking à Zurich. Faites partie de notre équipe L&F et aidez nos clients bancaires à transformer leurs pratiques de liquidité et de financement pour améliorer leur efficience en termes de coûts d'opportunité et satisfaire les exigences internes et externes, en collaborant étroitement avec les équipes Finance, Banking Restructuring et Risk. Soyez responsable du développement continu de la stratégie go-to-market pour la liquidité et le financement, et de la gestion de projets avec nos principaux clients bancaires. Développez des solutions qui aideront nos clients à mesurer, gérer et utiliser efficacement leurs actifs liquides sur une base opérationnelle à court terme et structurelle à moyen terme, et intégrez cette vision dans leur compréhension du risque dans un environnement de hausse des taux d'intérêt. Développez continuellement l'offre de services pour la pratique liquidité et financement et apportez un leadership éclairé au secteur bancaire. Faites partie d'une équipe qui opère fortement dans un environnement interdisciplinaire au sein de PwC. Vous construirez des ponts avec nos équipes qui travaillent à la pointe technologique dans l'analyse de big data et l'intelligence artificielle. Travaillez dans un environnement mondial avec les plus grandes banques ; vous serez intégré dans un réseau de notre entreprise qui rassemble et partage les connaissances sectorielles en matière de Liquidity & Funding dans le monde entier. Exigences : Excellent diplôme de master universitaire / ETH en Banking, Finance, Économie, Administration des entreprises ou dans un domaine connexe vous permettant de travailler avec des banques et d'autres sociétés de services financiers. Forte affinité pour les chiffres et les processus logiques, excellentes compétences en Excel et autres programmes quantitatifs, et grande aisance pour présenter vos idées en Power Point. Prenez la responsabilité d'accroître continuellement vos connaissances dans le secteur bancaire sur une base personnelle et intrinsèque tout au long de votre carrière. Plus de 3 ans (SA) / 5 ans (M) d'expérience pratique dans le secteur bancaire ou dans le conseil, avec une vaste expérience dans les domaines de la liquidité et du financement, y compris le Funds Transfer Pricing (FTP), et dans le travail avec les départements Trading, Treasury, Financial Risk ou Finance et Comptabilité. Vaste expérience avec des produits bancaires complexes. Anglais courant. L'allemand est un atout très significatif ; d'autres langues (p. ex. le français) sont les bienvenues. Disposé(e) à se rendre dans les sites internationaux des clients si nécessaire, sans être déçu(e) de ne pas avoir à quitter Zurich pendant un certain temps. Les compétences en programmation sont fortement recommandées et bénéfiques (p. ex. Python). Les certificats CFA et FRM constituent un atout significatif.

jobs.title: Senior Manager / Director Asset Management – Strategy & Transformation
jobs.description:
Join PwC Advisory to become part of our Financial Services Strategy & Transformation Team in Zurich.
Develop subject matter expertise at the very heart of how Asset Management and portfolio management including alternative investments, and other FS companies works, both on-site with clients and off-site with our international learning and education offerings and industry collaborations.
Advice the Asset Management clients across the full Asset Management value chain and asset classes including portfolio management and the underlying technology platforms.
Support the Asset Management clients to successfully manage their transformations including but not limited to investment management system selection and implementation, definition of target operating models, definition of data models, etc.
Be part of a team that operates strongly in an interdisciplinary environment within PwC. You will be using and building bridges to our fellow teams that work at the technological edge in big data analysis, artificial intelligence and robotic process automation.
Be responsible to lead large scale transformations with our asset management clients and lead business development efforts to generate leads and opportunities.
Work in a global environment with the largest FS companies (banks, insurances, crypto companies, etc.).
Live life-long learning; therefore, we will strongly encourage you to deepen your industry knowledge with adequate certifications.

Excellent University / ETH Master's degree in Banking, Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Information Technology or an adjacent field that enables you to work with asset managers and banks.
Ideally at least 8-10 years of experience in the Asset Management and Portfolio Management sector interacting in a global environment.
Expert in Asset Management, understand the full AM value chain and have multiple year of Asset Management consulting experience.
Experience with the leading investment management systems on the market and have worked with those systems before.
Experienced in leading projects and running command centers for large asset management transformations and post-merger integration.
Strong affinity for numbers and logical processes, are excellent with Excel and other quantitative programs and feel highly comfortable showing your ideas in Power Point.
You work well in a team, and you are able to work independently when needed.
Self-starter and fast learner, and can work well under tight deadlines.
Fluent in German and / or English, other languages are a plus.
Willing to travel to our client's international locations if required but are not disappointed if you are not needed to leave Zurich at all for a given time.

titleByLocale.it: Senior Manager / Direttore Asset Management – Strategy & Transformation
titleByLocale.en: Senior Manager / Director Asset Management – Strategy & Transformation
titleByLocale.de: Senior Manager / Direktor Asset Management – Strategy & Transformation

descriptionByLocale.it:
Unisciti a PwC Advisory per far parte del nostro team Financial Services Strategy & Transformation a Zurigo.
Sviluppa una profonda expertise nel cuore del funzionamento dell'Asset Management e della gestione di portafoglio, inclusi gli investimenti alternativi e le altre società di servizi finanziari, sia on-site con i clienti che off-site attraverso le nostre offerte internazionali di formazione e le collaborazioni di settore.
Consigli i clienti dell'Asset Management lungo l'intera catena del valore, le classi di attivi – inclusa la gestione di portafoglio – e le piattaforme tecnologiche sottostanti.
Supporta i clienti dell'Asset Management nella gestione efficace delle loro trasformazioni, incluse (ma non solo) la selezione e l'implementazione di sistemi di investment management, la definizione di target operating model e di modelli di dati, ecc.
Fai parte di un team che opera fortemente in un ambiente interdisciplinare all'interno di PwC. Utilizzerai e costruirai ponti con i team colleghi che lavorano all'avanguardia tecnologica nell'analisi dei big data, nell'intelligenza artificiale e nell'automazione robotica dei processi.
Sii responsabile di guidare trasformazioni su larga scala con i clienti dell'asset management e di condurre attività di business development per generare lead e opportunità.
Lavora in un contesto globale con le maggiori società di servizi finanziari (banche, assicurazioni, società crypto, ecc.).
Vivi il lifelong learning; pertanto, ti incoraggeremo fortemente ad approfondire le tue conoscenze di settore con adeguate certificazioni.

Eccellente laurea magistrale universitaria / ETH in Banking, Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Information Technology o in un campo affine che ti permetta di lavorare con asset manager e banche.
Idealmente almeno 8–10 anni di esperienza nel settore dell'Asset Management e della gestione di portafoglio in un contesto globale.
Esperto in Asset Management, comprende l'intera catena del valore AM e ha molteplici anni di esperienza nella consulenza nel settore dell'asset management.
Esperienza con i principali sistemi di investment management sul mercato e aver già lavorato con tali sistemi.
Esperienza nella gestione di progetti e nella direzione di command center per grandi trasformazioni nel settore dell'asset management e integrazioni post-merger.
Forte affinità con i numeri e i processi logici, eccellenti capacità in Excel e altri programmi quantitativi, e grande facilità nel presentare le proprie idee in Power Point.
Sai lavorare bene in team ed essere autonomo quando necessario.
Auto-motivato e con capacità di apprendimento rapido, sai lavorare efficacemente con scadenze ravvicinate.
Fluente in tedesco e/o inglese; altre lingue sono un plus.
Disponibilità a viaggiare presso le sedi internazionali dei clienti, se necessario, ma senza delusioni qualora non fosse necessario lasciare Zurigo per un determinato periodo.

Unterstütze Asset-Management-Kunden bei der erfolgreichen Steuerung ihrer Transformationen, einschliesslich (aber nicht beschränkt auf) Auswahl und Implementierung von Investment-Management-Systemen, Definition von Target Operating Models, Definition von Datenmodellen usw.
Werde Teil eines Teams, das stark in einem interdisziplinären Umfeld innerhalb von PwC agiert. Du wirst Brücken zu unseren Kollegenteams nutzen und aufbauen, die an der technologischen Spitze in Big-Data-Analyse, künstlicher Intelligenz und Robotic Process Automation arbeiten.
Sei verantwortlich für die Leitung grossangelegter Transformationen mit unseren Asset-Management-Kunden und die Führung von Business-Development-Aktivitäten zur Generierung von Leads und Chancen.
Arbeite in einem globalen Umfeld mit den grössten Finanzdienstleistungsunternehmen (Banken, Versicherungen, Crypto-Unternehmen usw.).
Lebe lebenslanges Lernen; daher werden wir dich nachdrücklich ermutigen, dein Branchenwissen durch entsprechende Zertifizierungen zu vertiefen.

Exzellenter Universitäts-/ETH-Masterabschluss in Banking, Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Informationstechnologie oder einem verwandten Bereich, der dir die Arbeit mit Asset Managern und Banken ermöglicht.
Idealer Weise mindestens 8–10 Jahre Erfahrung im Asset-Management- und Portfoliomanagement-Sektor in einem globalen Umfeld.
Experte im Asset Management, versteht die gesamte AM-Wertschöpfungskette und verfügt über mehrere Jahre Beratungserfahrung im Asset Management.
Erfahrung mit den führenden Investment-Management-Systemen auf dem Markt und bereits mit diesen Systemen gearbeitet.
Erfahrung in der Projektleitung und im Betrieb von Command Centern für grosse Asset-Management-Transformationen und Post-Merger-Integrationen.
Starke Affinität zu Zahlen und logischen Prozessen, ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse in Excel und anderen quantitativen Programmen sowie grosses Wohlbefinden beim Präsentieren deiner Ideen in Power Point.
Gute Teamfähigkeit sowie die Fähigkeit, bei Bedarf selbstständig zu arbeiten.
Selbststarter und schneller Lernender, der gut unter engen Deadlines arbeiten kann.
Fliessende Deutsch- und/oder Englischkenntnisse; weitere Sprachen sind ein Plus.
Bereitschaft, bei Bedarf zu den internationalen Standorten der Kunden zu reisen, aber nicht enttäuscht zu sein, wenn du für eine bestimmte Zeit Zürich nicht verlassen musst.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Rejoignez PwC Advisory pour faire partie de notre équipe Financial Services Strategy & Transformation à Zurich.
Développez une expertise approfondie au cœur du fonctionnement de la gestion d'actifs et de la gestion de portefeuille, y compris les investissements alternatifs et les autres sociétés de services financiers, aussi bien sur site chez les clients qu'à distance grâce à nos offres internationales de formation et nos collaborations sectorielles.
Conseillez les clients en Asset Management sur l'ensemble de la chaîne de valeur, les classes d'actifs – y compris la gestion de portefeuille – et les plateformes technologiques sous-jacentes.
Aidez les clients en Asset Management à gérer avec succès leurs transformations, notamment (sans s'y limiter) la sélection et la mise en œuvre de systèmes de gestion des investissements, la définition de modèles opérationnels cibles, la définition de modèles de données, etc.
Faites partie d'une équipe qui opère fortement dans un environnement interdisciplinaire au sein de PwC. Vous construirez des ponts avec nos équipes qui travaillent à la pointe technologique dans l'analyse de big data, l'intelligence artificielle et l'automatisation robotique des processus.
Soyez responsable de diriger des transformations à grande échelle avec nos clients en asset management et de mener des activités de développement commercial pour générer des leads et des opportunités.
Travaillez dans un environnement mondial avec les plus grandes sociétés de services financiers (banques, assurances, sociétés crypto, etc.).
Vivez l'apprentissage tout au long de la vie ; nous vous encouragerons donc fortement à approfondir vos connaissances sectorielles grâce à des certifications adéquates.

Excellent diplôme de master universitaire / ETH en Banking, Finance, Économie, Administration des entreprises, Technologies de l'information ou dans un domaine connexe vous permettant de travailler avec des gestionnaires d'actifs et des banques.
Idéalement au moins 8 à 10 ans d'expérience dans le secteur de la gestion d'actifs et de portefeuille en interaction dans un environnement mondial.
Expert en Asset Management, maîtrise l'ensemble de la chaîne de valeur AM et possède plusieurs années d'expérience en conseil dans le secteur de la gestion d'actifs.
Expérience avec les principaux systèmes de gestion des investissements sur le marché et ayant déjà travaillé avec ces systèmes.
Expérience dans la direction de projets et dans la gestion de command centers pour de grandes transformations dans le secteur de la gestion d'actifs et des intégrations post-fusion.
Forte affinité pour les chiffres et les processus logiques, excellentes compétences en Excel et autres programmes quantitatifs, et grande aisance pour présenter vos idées en Power Point.
Bonne aptitude au travail en équipe et capacité à travailler de manière autonome si nécessaire.
Personne autonome et qui apprend rapidement, capable de travailler efficacement dans des délais serrés.
Fluent en allemand et/ou en anglais ; d'autres langues sont un atout.
Disposé(e) à se rendre dans les sites internationaux des clients si nécessaire, sans être déçu(e) de ne pas avoir à quitter Zurich pendant un certain temps.

jobs.title: Manager Transaction Services - Financial Services
jobs.description:
Helping our clients in the Financial Services industry with dedicated support for transactions in a wide variety of circumstances (acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures & structured investments).
You will have the opportunity to work across the areas of buy-side due diligence, sell-side assistance and vendor due diligence, deal and negotiation support for both corporate and private equity clients.
Collaborating with other experts to develop a rapid understanding of the client's business and issues, and articulate your findings appropriately in order to deliver high quality reports.
Working in a diversified, international environment covering multiple areas.
Teaming up with a network of highly talented and knowledgeable experts.

You have a bachelor's or master's degree and have a background in finance (CPA or CFA).
You have a thorough understanding of financial accounting and reporting requirements in accordance with internationally recognized reporting standards.
At least 5 years of work experience, including 3 years in providing financial due diligence and other transaction-related services in the Financial Services industry.
Fluent in English, any other language is a plus.
You are energetic, proactive, able to empathise with clients and staff, and are enthusiastic about delivering value to clients.
Flexible and demonstrate willingness to conduct business travel for client assignments or business-related matters.
Excellent analytical skills and are experienced in using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint and additional analytical software tools (e.g. PowerBI, Alteryx) to analyse and present data in a meaningful and efficient way.

titleByLocale.it: Manager Transaction Services - Financial Services
titleByLocale.en: Manager Transaction Services - Financial Services

descriptionByLocale.it:
Supportare i nostri clienti nel settore dei Financial Services con assistenza dedicata per transazioni in un'ampia varietà di situazioni (acquisizioni, cessioni, joint venture e investimenti strutturati).
Avrai l'opportunità di operare nelle aree della due diligence buy-side, dell'assistenza sell-side e della vendor due diligence, del supporto alle trattative e alle negoziazioni per clienti corporate e di private equity.
Collaborare con altri esperti per sviluppare una rapida comprensione del business e delle problematiche del cliente, e articolare adeguatamente i risultati per consegnare report di alta qualità.
Lavorare in un ambiente diversificato e internazionale che abbraccia più aree.
Collaborare con una rete di esperti altamente qualificati e competenti.

Hai una laurea triennale o magistrale con una formazione in finanza (CPA o CFA).
Hai una conoscenza approfondita dei principi contabili e dei requisiti di reporting in conformità con gli standard di rendicontazione internazionalmente riconosciuti.
Almeno 5 anni di esperienza lavorativa, di cui 3 anni nella fornitura di servizi di financial due diligence e altri servizi legati alle transazioni nel settore dei Financial Services.
Inglese fluente; la conoscenza di qualsiasi altra lingua è un plus.
Sei energico, proattivo, capace di empatizzare con clienti e collaboratori e sei entusiasta di creare valore per i clienti.
Flessibile e disponibile a effettuare trasferte di lavoro per incarichi cliente o per questioni aziendali.
Eccellenti capacità analitiche ed esperienza nell'uso di Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint e ulteriori strumenti software analitici (es. PowerBI, Alteryx) per analizzare e presentare i dati in modo significativo ed efficiente.
descriptionByLocale.en:
Helping our clients in the Financial Services industry with dedicated support for transactions in a wide variety of circumstances (acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures & structured investments).
You will have the opportunity to work across the areas of buy-side due diligence, sell-side assistance and vendor due diligence, deal and negotiation support for both corporate and private equity clients.
Collaborating with other experts to develop a rapid understanding of the client's business and issues, and articulate your findings appropriately in order to deliver high quality reports.
Working in a diversified, international environment covering multiple areas.
Teaming up with a network of highly talented and knowledgeable experts.

You have a bachelor's or master's degree and have a background in finance (CPA or CFA).
You have a thorough understanding of financial accounting and reporting requirements in accordance with internationally recognized reporting standards.
At least 5 years of work experience, including 3 years in providing financial due diligence and other transaction-related services in the Financial Services industry.
Fluent in English, any other language is a plus.
You are energetic, proactive, able to empathise with clients and staff, and are enthusiastic about delivering value to clients.
Flexible and demonstrate willingness to conduct business travel for client assignments or business-related matters.
Excellent analytical skills and are experienced in using Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint and additional analytical software tools (e.g. PowerBI, Alteryx) to analyse and present data in a meaningful and efficient way.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Unterstützung unserer Kunden in der Finanzdienstleistungsbranche mit gezielter Begleitung bei Transaktionen in einer Vielzahl von Situationen (Akquisitionen, Veräusserungen, Joint Ventures und strukturierte Investitionen).
Du wirst die Möglichkeit haben, in den Bereichen Buy-side Due Diligence, Sell-side-Unterstützung und Vendor Due Diligence sowie Deal- und Verhandlungsunterstützung für sowohl Corporate- als auch Private-Equity-Kunden zu arbeiten.
Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Experten, um ein rasches Verständnis des Geschäfts und der Probleme des Kunden zu entwickeln und die Ergebnisse angemessen zu artikulieren, um hochwertige Berichte zu liefern.
Arbeit in einem diversifizierten, internationalen Umfeld, das mehrere Bereiche abdeckt.
Zusammenarbeit mit einem Netzwerk hochtalentierter und kenntnisreicher Experten.

Du hast einen Bachelor- oder Masterabschluss mit Hintergrund in Finance (CPA oder CFA).
Du hast ein fundiertes Verständnis der Finanzbuchhaltung und Berichterstattungsanforderungen gemäss international anerkannten Rechnungslegungsstandards.
Mindestens 5 Jahre Berufserfahrung, davon 3 Jahre in der Erbringung von Financial Due Diligence und anderen transaktionsbezogenen Dienstleistungen in der Finanzdienstleistungsbranche.
Fliessende Englischkenntnisse; jede weitere Sprache ist ein Plus.
Du bist energiegeladen, proaktiv, kannst dich in Kunden und Mitarbeiter einfühlen und bist begeistert davon, Kunden Mehrwert zu liefern.
Flexibel und bereit, für Kundenaufträge oder geschäftliche Angelegenheiten Geschäftsreisen durchzuführen.
Ausgezeichnete analytische Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung im Umgang mit Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint und weiteren analytischen Softwaretools (z. B. PowerBI, Alteryx) zur sinnvollen und effizienten Analyse und Präsentation von Daten.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Aider nos clients dans le secteur des services financiers avec un soutien dédié pour les transactions dans une grande variété de situations (acquisitions, cessions, coentreprises et investissements structurés).
Vous aurez l'opportunité d'intervenir dans les domaines de la due diligence côté acheteur, de l'assistance côté vendeur et de la vendor due diligence, du soutien aux transactions et aux négociations pour les clients tant corporate que de private equity.
Collaborer avec d'autres experts pour développer une compréhension rapide des activités et des problématiques du client, et formuler vos conclusions de manière appropriée afin de produire des rapports de haute qualité.
Travailler dans un environnement diversifié et international couvrant de multiples domaines.
Travailler avec un réseau d'experts hautement talentueux et compétents.

Vous avez une licence ou un master avec une formation en finance (CPA ou CFA).
Vous avez une compréhension approfondie des exigences en matière de comptabilité financière et de reporting conformément aux normes de reporting internationalement reconnues.
Au moins 5 ans d'expérience professionnelle, dont 3 ans dans la fourniture de services de due diligence financière et d'autres services liés aux transactions dans le secteur des services financiers.
Anglais courant ; toute autre langue est un atout.
Vous êtes dynamique, proactif, capable de vous mettre à la place des clients et du personnel, et enthousiaste à l'idée de créer de la valeur pour les clients.
Flexible et disposé(e) à effectuer des déplacements professionnels pour des missions clients ou des raisons commerciales.
Excellentes compétences analytiques et expérience dans l'utilisation de Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint et d'autres outils logiciels analytiques (p. ex. PowerBI, Alteryx) pour analyser et présenter des données de manière pertinente et efficace.

jobs.title: Codeur·euse médical·e 60-100%
jobs.description:
Conduisez ou accompagnez les révisions du codage conformément au règlement d'exécution sous SwissDRG.
Assurez le conseil médical et le conseil en gestion d'entreprise dans le cadre du controlling stratégique et opérationnel.
Prenez en charge principalement les clients situés en Suisse romande.
Développez vos compétences techniques et vos "soft skills" grâce à diverses formations internes et externes, dans un environnement favorisant le coaching et le feedback actif.

Diplôme de codage médical avec brevet fédéral et plusieurs années d'expérience dans le domaine, qualification pour maintenir la liste des réviseurs de l'OFS.
Formation médicale et solides connaissances des tarifs.
Excellente maîtrise orale et écrite du français, ainsi que de bonnes connaissances en allemand ou en anglais.
Excellentes aptitudes en communication, fort engagement, orientation client et esprit d'équipe.
Méthode de travail autonome et rigoureuse.

titleByLocale.it: Codificatore/Codificatrice medico/a 60-100%
titleByLocale.en: Codeur·euse médical·e 60-100%

descriptionByLocale.it:
Condurre o accompagnare le revisioni della codifica conformemente al regolamento di esecuzione nell'ambito di SwissDRG.
Fornire consulenza medica e gestionale nell'ambito del controlling strategico e operativo.
Occuparsi principalmente dei clienti situati nella Svizzera romanda.
Sviluppare le proprie competenze tecniche e le soft skills grazie a diverse formazioni interne ed esterne, in un ambiente che favorisce il coaching e il feedback attivo.

Diploma di codifica medica con brevetto federale e diversi anni di esperienza nel settore, qualifica per mantenere la lista dei revisori dell'UST.
Formazione medica e solide conoscenze delle tariffe.
Eccellente padronanza orale e scritta del francese, nonché buone conoscenze del tedesco o dell'inglese.
Eccellenti capacità comunicative, forte impegno, orientamento al cliente e spirito di squadra.
Metodo di lavoro autonomo e rigoroso.

jobs.title: Steuerspezialist:in mit Fokus auf Steuerdeklarationen
jobs.description:
Erstelle und überprüfe Gewinnsteuererklärungen und Steuerveranlagungen für juristische Personen.
Begleite die Abschlussplanung von Unternehmen und berechne dabei die erforderlichen Steuerrückstellungen.
Bearbeite steuerliche Anfragen.
Unterstütze bei Unternehmensstrukturierungen, Transaktionen und Steuerplanungsprojekten.
Erwerbe umfassendes technisches Know-how und Soft Skills durch On-and-off-the-job-Trainings.
Arbeite in einem inspirierenden Team und schärfe dein persönliches und berufliches Profil durch regelmässiges Feedback von Kolleg: innen und Vorgesetzten.

Habe eine Ausbildung im Bereich Steuern oder eine abgeschlossene kaufmännische Grundausbildung mit Erfahrung oder suche den Wiedereinstieg im Steuerbereich für juristische Personen.
Sei eine hoch motivierte, dynamische und zielstrebige Persönlichkeit, die analytisches Arbeiten schätzt und sich nicht vor komplexen Fragestellungen scheut.
Zeige hohe Lernbereitschaft und habe ein ausgeprägtes Flair für Zahlen.
Übernehme von Anfang an Verantwortung und bewege dich in einem Umfeld mit aktiver Coaching- und Feedbackkultur.
Weise ausgezeichnete EDV-Kenntnisse in Word, Excel und PowerPoint auf.
Sei stilsicher in Deutsch und habe sehr gute Englischkenntnisse.

titleByLocale.it: Specialista fiscale con focus sulle dichiarazioni dei redditi
titleByLocale.en: Steuerspezialist:in mit Fokus auf Steuerdeklarationen

descriptionByLocale.it:
Redige e verifica dichiarazioni dei redditi e accertamenti fiscali per persone giuridiche.
Accompagna la pianificazione di chiusura delle imprese calcolando gli accantonamenti fiscali necessari.
Elabora richieste di natura fiscale.
Supporta nelle ristrutturazioni aziendali, nelle transazioni e nei progetti di pianificazione fiscale.
Acquisisci un know-how tecnico approfondito e soft skill attraverso formazioni on-the-job e off-the-job.
Lavora in un team stimolante e affina il tuo profilo personale e professionale grazie al feedback regolare di colleghi e superiori.

Offer una formazione nel settore fiscale o una formazione commerciale di base completata con esperienza, oppure stai cercando di rientrare nel settore fiscale per persone giuridiche.
Sei una personalità altamente motivata, dinamica e determinata, che apprezza il lavoro analitico e non teme questioni complesse.
Mostri grande disponibilità all'apprendimento e hai spiccate doti numeriche.
Assumi responsabilità fin dall'inizio e lavori in un ambiente con una cultura attiva di coaching e feedback.
Possiedi eccellenti competenze informatiche in Word, Excel e PowerPoint.
Sei stilisticamente sicuro in tedesco e hai ottime conoscenze di inglese.

jobs.title: Tax Accounting Senior Associate
jobs.description:
Work in our growing tax accounting team in Zurich. Occasional deployment at other locations in Switzerland is possible.
Support our customers in tax accounting matters with regard to various accounting standards (e.g. IFRS, US GAAP, etc.). This includes providing support in our client's provision processes as well as supporting assurance teams with procedures to be performed over income tax related positions.
Support engagement teams with Pillar 2 related questions including calculations and related technical assessments
Work on external publications and support the development of internal training materials, newsletters, etc.
Work in a dynamic team in an international environment where there is a lot to learn and opportunities to develop.

Ready for a challenge in a new, dynamic and interesting environment with have a flair for accounting and taxes.
Bachelor's or similar degree in economics, Finance, Accounting or similar field and preferably already first (internship) experiences in auditing / financial accounting / tax consulting.
Fluent in English, any additional language is an asset
Able to take on responsibility right from the start and move confidently in a dynamic, demanding environment.
Motivated, resilient and determined personality who is not afraid of complex issues. You can deal with change and adapt quickly to new/spontaneous circumstances.

titleByLocale.it: Tax Accounting Senior Associate
titleByLocale.en: Tax Accounting Senior Associate

descriptionByLocale.it:
**Specialista in Tax Accounting**

**Sede:** Zurigo, Svizzera (con possibili spostamenti occasionali in altre sedi in Svizzera)

**Descrizione del ruolo:**

Stiamo cercando uno Specialista in Tax Accounting da inserire nel nostro team in crescita a Zurigo. In qualità di membro chiave del team, supporterai i nostri clienti in materia di tax accounting relativi a diversi standard contabili, inclusi IFRS e US GAAP. Le tue responsabilità comprenderanno:

- Supporto nei processi di provisioning per i clienti
- Assistenza ai team di revisione nelle procedure relative alle posizioni fiscali sul reddito
- Supporto ai team di engagement su tematiche legate al Pillar 2, inclusi calcoli e valutazioni tecniche
- Contributo a pubblicazioni esterne e sviluppo di materiali formativi interni, newsletter, ecc.

**Requisiti:**

- Laurea triennale in Economia, Finanza, Contabilità o in un campo correlato
- Esperienza pregressa in revisione contabile, contabilità finanziaria o consulenza fiscale è preferita
- Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese; la conoscenza di lingue aggiuntive è considerata un plus
- Capacità di assumersi responsabilità fin dall'inizio e di prosperare in un ambiente dinamico e impegnativo
- Personalità motivata, resiliente e determinata, con propensione per la contabilità e la fiscalità
- Capacità di adattarsi rapidamente a situazioni nuove e improvvise
descriptionByLocale.en:
Work in our growing tax accounting team in Zurich. Occasional deployment at other locations in Switzerland is possible.
Support our customers in tax accounting matters with regard to various accounting standards (e.g. IFRS, US GAAP, etc.). This includes providing support in our client's provision processes as well as supporting assurance teams with procedures to be performed over income tax related positions.
Support engagement teams with Pillar 2 related questions including calculations and related technical assessments
Work on external publications and support the development of internal training materials, newsletters, etc.
Work in a dynamic team in an international environment where there is a lot to learn and opportunities to develop.

Ready for a challenge in a new, dynamic and interesting environment with have a flair for accounting and taxes.
Bachelor's or similar degree in economics, Finance, Accounting or similar field and preferably already first (internship) experiences in auditing / financial accounting / tax consulting.
Fluent in English, any additional language is an asset
Able to take on responsibility right from the start and move confidently in a dynamic, demanding environment.
Motivated, resilient and determined personality who is not afraid of complex issues. You can deal with change and adapt quickly to new/spontaneous circumstances.

jobs.title: Manager and Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting
jobs.description:
As a Manager / Senior Manager in our fast growing Life Sciences R&D Consulting team, you will be at the heart of transforming how leading pharma, biotech and medtech organisations discover, develop and deliver therapies to patients. You will:Sell, lead and deliver high impact projects – Shape and close new opportunities, then lead diverse teams to deliver complex programmes that improve R&D productivity, accelerate development timelines, enhance quality and compliance, and unlock new value for our clients.
Develop new ideas and propositions – Identify emerging client needs and industry trends, and turn them into distinctive consulting offerings, thought leadership and market leading solutions that you will take directly to clients.
Work cross functionally across the value chain – Solve end to end challenges spanning R&D, manufacturing and commercial, helping clients break down silos and design integrated operating models, processes and technologies. Collaborate across borders and disciplines – Work with international clients and teams, partnering closely with PwC's global network of life sciences, digital, data/AI and change specialists to bring the best of PwC to every engagement.
Shape a high growth practice – Play a key role in building our rapidly expanding team: developing our people, strengthening our culture, and helping to define how we work and what we take to market as we scale.
You'll work on mission critical issues for top tier life sciences companies, while contributing directly to the growth and direction of a dynamic and entrepreneurial practice within PwC.

Bachelor's or Master's degree in a science related discipline (e.g. life sciences, chemistry, biomedical engineering, pharmacy or related field)
At least 6 years' relevant work experience, with a strong track record of delivering results in complex environments
Minimum 3 years' experience in the consulting industry (mandatory), ideally with exposure to life sciences / healthcare clients
Fluency in English (written and spoken); additional knowledge of German and/or French is highly desirable
Willingness and ability to travel to serve international clients as needed
Experience utilizing AI in both client delivery and as consulting tools

What gives you a competitive edge:
Experience working with a start up or entrepreneurial mentality – proactive, hands on, and comfortable building from a blank sheet
High comfort with ambiguity and change, with the ability to adapt quickly and remain effective in uncertain or evolving situations
Proven ability to manage complexity – across multi workstream projects, diverse stakeholder groups and global organisations
Agile and intellectually curious mindset, continuously seeking new ways to solve problems, learn new topics and apply innovative approaches
Good understanding of the clinical development lifecycle and associated functions, such as:
* Portfolio and scenario planning
* Regulatory strategy and submissions
* Pre commercialisation activities (e.g. market access, medical affairs, launch readiness)
* Commercialisation activities (e.g. go to market strategy, brand planning, lifecycle management)

Demonstrated experience in sales and business development, including identifying opportunities, contributing to proposals and pitches, and building long term client relationships

titleByLocale.it: Manager e Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting
titleByLocale.en: Manager and Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting
titleByLocale.de: Manager und Senior Manager in Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting
titleByLocale.fr: Manager et Senior Manager en Life Sciences R&D Management Consulting

descriptionByLocale.it:
**Manager / Senior Manager - Life Sciences R&D Consulting**

In qualità di Manager / Senior Manager nel nostro team in rapida crescita dedicato alla consulenza in R&D per le Life Sciences, sarai al centro della trasformazione del modo in cui le principali organizzazioni farmaceutiche, biotech e medtech scoprono, sviluppano e distribuiscono terapie ai pazienti. Ti occuperai di:

- Vendere, guidare e consegnare progetti ad alto impatto – Definire e concludere nuove opportunità, quindi guidare team eterogenei nella realizzazione di programmi complessi che migliorano la produttività R&D, accelerano i tempi di sviluppo, migliorano qualità e compliance, e creano nuovo valore per i clienti.
- Sviluppare nuove idee e proposte – Identificare i bisogni emergenti dei clienti e i trend del settore, e trasformarli in offerte di consulenza distintive, thought leadership e soluzioni leader di mercato da portare direttamente ai clienti.
- Lavorare in modo interfunzionale lungo la catena del valore – Risolvere sfide end-to-end che spaziano tra R&D, produzione e commerciale, aiutando i clienti ad abbattere i silos e a progettare modelli operativi, processi e tecnologie integrati. Collaborare oltre i confini e le discipline – Lavorare con clienti e team internazionali, collaborando strettamente con la rete globale di PwC di specialisti in life sciences, digitale, data/AI e change management per portare il meglio di PwC in ogni incarico.
- Plasmare una practice in forte crescita – Svolgere un ruolo chiave nella costruzione del nostro team in rapida espansione: sviluppando le nostre persone, rafforzando la nostra cultura e contribuendo a definire come lavoriamo e cosa portiamo al mercato mentre cresciamo.
- Lavorerai su questioni mission-critical per aziende life sciences di primo livello, contribuendo direttamente alla crescita e alla direzione di una practice dinamica e imprenditoriale all'interno di PwC.

**Requisiti:**

- Laurea triennale o magistrale in una disciplina scientifica (es. life sciences, chimica, ingegneria biomedica, farmacia o campo correlato)
- Almeno 6 anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante, con un solido track record di risultati in ambienti complessi
- Minimo 3 anni di esperienza nel settore della consulenza (obbligatorio), idealmente con esposizione a clienti del settore life sciences/healthcare
- Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese (scritto e parlato); una conoscenza aggiuntiva del tedesco e/o del francese è molto desiderabile
- Disponibilità e capacità di viaggiare per servire clienti internazionali quando necessario
- Esperienza nell'utilizzo dell'AI sia nella delivery ai clienti che come strumenti di consulenza

**Cosa ti dà un vantaggio competitivo:**

- Esperienza di lavoro con mentalità da start-up o imprenditoriale – proattivo, operativo e a proprio agio nel costruire da zero
- Grande capacità di gestire l'ambiguità e il cambiamento, con la capacità di adattarsi rapidamente e rimanere efficace in situazioni incerte o in evoluzione
- Comprovata capacità di gestire la complessità – in progetti multi-workstream, gruppi eterogenei di stakeholder e organizzazioni globali
- Mentalità agile e intellettualmente curiosa, che ricerca continuamente nuovi modi di risolvere i problemi, apprendere nuovi argomenti e applicare approcci innovativi
- Buona comprensione del ciclo di vita dello sviluppo clinico e delle funzioni associate, come:
  * Pianificazione del portfolio e degli scenari
  * Strategia e presentazione delle pratiche regolamentari
  * Attività di pre-commercializzazione (es. accesso al mercato, medical affairs, readiness per il lancio)
  * Attività di commercializzazione (es. strategia go-to-market, pianificazione del brand, gestione del ciclo di vita)

- Esperienza dimostrata nelle vendite e nello sviluppo del business, inclusa l'identificazione di opportunità, il contributo a proposte e pitch, e la costruzione di relazioni a lungo termine con i clienti.
